# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio-admin
spec:
  components:
    ingressGateways:
    - name: istio-ingressgateway
      enabled: false
    egressGateways:
    - name: istio-egressgateway
      enabled: false
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        adminPort: 15000
    pilot:
      configMap: true
    sidecarInjectorWebhook:
      injectLabel: istio-injection
    meshConfig:
      defaultConfig:
        proxyAdminPort: 15000
        proxyStatsMatcher:
          inclusionList:
            paths:
            - /config_dump
            - /stats
            - /clusters
        listeners:
        - name: admin_listener
          address:
            socketAddress:
              address: 0.0.0.0
              portValue: 15000
          filterChains:
          - filters:
            - name: envoy.filters.listener.http_connection_manager
              typedConfig:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.listener.v3.Listener
                name: admin
                address:
                  socketAddress:
                    address: 0.0.0.0
                    portValue: 15000
                filterChains:
                - filters:
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.health_check
                    typedConfig:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.health_check.v3.HealthCheck
                      path: /healthz
                      cluster: management
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.router
                    typedConfig:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router
        statsConfig:
          statsMatcher:
            inclusionList:
              paths:
              - /config_dump
              - /stats
              - /clusters
  profile: minimal
